subcodes.first_line: O my tender Lord! Cause me to enter Thy laden Ark, teach me Thy hidden mystery, and guide me unto the pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مولای الحنون ادخلنی فی فلکک المشحون و علمنی سرک المکنون و دلنی علی اصداف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for praise and gratitude
